title: Srila Prabhupada Stories 1: Can you dance your way to Krishna?
speaker: HG Chanchalapathi Dasa

segments.text: ओमा ज्ञानति मिरान्धस्या ज्ञानाञ्जन शलाकया चक्षुरुन मिलितन एनतस्माई श्री गुरवे नमहा
नमा ओम विश्णु पाधाय कृष्ण प्रेष्टाय भूतले शिमते भक्ति वेदांत स्वामिन इति नामिने
नमस्ते सारस्वते देवे गौरवाणी प्रचारिने निर्विशेशा शुन्यवादी भास्चात्य देशतारिने
जय श्री कृष्ण चेतन्या प्रभू नित्यानंदा श्री अद्भाईत अगदाधरः शिवासादी गौरभक्त बृण्धा
कि हरे कृष्ण हरे कृष्ण कृष्ण कृष्ण हरे हरे हरे रामा हरे रामा रामा रामा हरे हरे
हरे कृष्णा नाइस टू बी विथ आल अफ यू
कि वन अफ थे थिंग्स डाट वेन समवन कम्स टू इसकाउन
कि समथिंग देट इस वेरी स्ट्राइकिंग
कि इस द वे डिवोटीज डांस इन एक किर्टन इन ए फॉर्म ऑफ वर्षिप आफ कृष्णा
कि आई थिंग टुड़े इन इंडिया
इसकाउन इस वेल नौन एंड यू में सी मोर डिवोटीज सिंगिंग एंड चैंटिंग एंड सो इट में भी ए लोट
मोर कॉमन दैन इट वास वेन आई फर्स्ट केम इन टच विद इसकाउन इन द येयर नाइंटीन एटी
एंड ऑल दो मोर इन साउथ इंडिया दिस काइंड आफ ए वर्षिप इस नॉट वेरी वेल नौन
है तो यू कैन इमैजिन इन नाइंटीन एटी आई वस ए यंग स्कूडेंट इन ए कॉलेज आई वस ओनली अपार्ट सेवन्टीन
टेसर्स ओल्ड आईएट कम टू इसकांड एंड अइस आईएट डिबोटीज सिंगिंग एंड दैंसिंग इन फ्रंट ऑफ थे कृष्ण डियाटी सो इट वस ए
बड़ी बड़ी अन्यूशियल थिंग एंड सॉ आई वस वंडरिंग व्हाट इस थिस गोइंग ऑन हिया नेवर एक्सपेक्टेंट थैंक थिंग एंड डांसिंग लाइक थैंक के लिए फॉर्म ऑफ वर्षिप
आफ कॉर्स भाजन से समथिंग वेट एवरी वन इन इंडिया इस फैमिलिया इन ऑन पार्ट्स ऑफ इंडिया बट स्टैनिंग आप अन्ड डांसिंग वह समथिंग वेरी वेरी
स्ट्राइकिंग अन्यू आई बिगैन टू असोसियेट विद डिवोटीज एंड अटेंड प्रोग्राम्स इन थे टेंपल एट था टाइम टेंपल इन बैंगलोर वास ए स्माल हाउस इन ए वेरी ऑप्सक्यॉर लोकेशन ऑन वेस्ट अफ कॉर्ड रॉड
आई साइड स्टार्टर रीडिंग शिला प्रभुपाद बुक्स एंड आई फाउंड द बुक्स एंड फिलॉसोफी टू वेरी वंडरफॉर्ट
बट सम अफ दीस प्रैक्टिसेस वर वेरी न्यू यू शुट अंडरस्टेंट एट्स समवन कमिंग फ्रॉम साउथ इंडिया एंड दोस्ट देश इसकान वास नॉट सो वेल नौन एंड वीडिंग हाव द मीडिया एंड ऑल अफ तोस काइन अप थिंग्स लाइक यू हाव
इफ आई रेमेंबर राइट मेबी दूर दर्शन वास जस्ट कमिंग ए ब्लैक एंड वाइट टेलेविशन वास जस्ट कमिंग इंटो थे मार्केट सो इट वास था काइन अफ एस सिचुएशन
एंड वेनरेट शील प्रावुपाथ बुक्स एंड आई वस हिरिंग अपार्ट चैतन्या महाप्रभु
हुए इंट्रोड्यूस्ट दिस फॉर्म ऑफ वर्षिप चैतन्या महाप्रभु एंड हिस मेबी आ है जस्ट हर्ड अपार्ट थे नेम वेरी वेरी बैरली
मेबी रीडिंग इन ए हिस्ट्री बुक और सम्तिंग बट नथिंग मोर देन थे तो तो देना है फ्रॉम शील प्रावुपाथ बुक्स थे आउट चैतन्या
महाप्रभु हैड इंट्रोड्यूस्ट इस फाइन हंड्रेड यूएस एगो इन वेस्ट बेंगॉल इन नदिया एंड लेटर ऑन चैतन्या
महाप्रभु केम टू जगन नाथ पूरी एंड देर ही हैड प्रफॉर्म्ड कीर्टन्स एंड देन आई ऑसो हर्ड देखाओ चैतन्या
महाप्रभु ट्रावेल्ड इन साथ इंडिया फॉर अबाउट ए येर ऑर सो फ्रॉम विलेज टो विलेज ऑल दे वे डाउन अप टो कन्या
कुमारी एंड एन एकेइन ऑल दे वे अप नॉर्थ ऑन दे वेस्टर्न कोस्ट ऑफ इंडिया एंड वेन ही वेंट फ्रॉम विलेज टो विलेज
ही इंड्यूस्ट पीपल टो सिंग एंड चैन्ट एंड डांस वेन यू रीड चेतन्य चरिताम्रुथा यू वेल फाइंड ऑल अफ दिस मेंशन एंड वे ऑसो रीड थे अब
चेतन्य महाप्रभु वेंट टो वारणासी ही वेंट टो मातुरा एंड इवेन इन टो ब्रिंदावन एंड इन ऑल दोस्त प्लेसेस ऑल्सो ही एड चैन्टेड एंड डांस
सॉफ्ट आई वस रीडिंग ऑल अफ दिस काइन अफ थिंग्स अब अब देन देर वासे एंड आफ इफ आई रिमेंबर राइट मेबी वेन आई एड ऑलरेडी बिगन सिंगिंग एंड डांसिंग इन देखिए दिन विद देवोटीज
बट स्टिल समयर इट वस नागिंग इस थिस सम न्यू थिंग बैट हस बीन इंट्रोड्यूस्ट इन इस कॉन बाई प्रभु पादा और सम्थिंग लाइक थे एंड डूरिंग दोस्ट देश आ यूज़ टो मीट ए लॉट आफ स्कॉलर्स मद्भा स्कॉलर्स रामानुज�
एंड आस्ट इम अप डांसिंग सिंगिंग एंड डांसिंग एंड वर्षिपिंग कृष्ण दिस वें ही कोटेड वन अफ द दासास अफ द फॉलोवर्स अफ मद्भाचार्य संप्रधायन एंड ही आई कांट रिमेंबर थे पर्टिकुलर सॉन बट ही आई रिमेंबर हिम से
लिस्टन टू यू अब चिंद जो सेट अंड कौन आउट कृष्ण स्नेल कृष्ण डेयल स्टैन है कि बिन प्लीज बाय देवोटी कॉइंग अट इस नेम
and if you stand and chant Krishna's name
the song said Krishna will be so pleased that he will dance
and then it said if you call out Krishna's name, sing and dance
Krishna will be so pleased he will say I am yours
so when I heard about this song written by one of the great devotees
इन मद्भचारिय संप्रधाया और फिर यह वह बिल्कुल एक बच्च के लिए ग्रेट रियाशियरेंस दो जो यह वर्षित का श्रीलाप्रभु पाद है
इंट्रव्यूस इस नाथ संकर फिर न्यू फाउंड दिए इस वे त्रदेशनल थिंग
कि एक तरफ रीनफर्स थर्ड आवच पृष्णिय महाप्रभु एड इंट्रव्यूस थिस और इंडिया 500 तक और थे
और तुम्हें मैं आपका लेकर कहती हूं कि श्रील प्रभुपाद के लिए जब वह अमेरिका जग्रे रहा था
कि वह बढ़ते हैं वह जानते हैं जिससे बार ताकि 1965 और फिर बाद करते हैं स्तर्टव में अमेरिका और फिर
1966 में श्रीला प्रभुपार फॉर्म्ड इंटरनेशनल सोसाइटी फॉर कृष्ण कंश्युसनेस
एंड इन देट स्मॉल टेंपल विच विच केम टू बी कॉल अच्छा टेंपल ए इट वास एक्शन लियर स्टोर इन
न्यू यॉर्क सिटी ट्वेंडी सिक्स सेकंड अवेन्यू इट वास ए स्टोर इट वास ए लाइक ए लॉन्ग स्टोर विद ए डिस्प्लेय शोकेस इन द फ्रंट एंड ए डोर फॉर पीपल टो कम इन एंड श्रीला प्रभुपार
ए विधि अगर आप इस ब्लेस इवे नौ इस कांटर से व्यवस्थ थ्रत विकूस थे फर्स प्लेस फर्स टेंपल और श्री ला प्रभुपार आउट्साइड आफ इंडिया एंड सो इवे नौ डिवोटीज गो थे टू सीट्स इट स्वन आफ थे भूली प्लेस इस न्य�
introduced, although we know Srila Prabhupada was representing a very very ancient
tradition of Krishna Bhakti, Chaitanya Mahaprabhu and his predecessors, Madhvacharya
and his predecessors, Veda Vyasa and Narada and Krishna himself. And when Srila
Prabhupada went to America, he was gradually introducing one by one different
aspects of Krishna Bhakti, Krishna Consciousness. So at some point Srila Prabhupada
introduced this singing and dancing. Very quickly he had introduced the singing.
He would chant the Hare Krishna Mantra for a long time and devotees would sit and
and hear him singing and repeat like a bhajan. And at some point Srila Prabhupada
introduced dancing, a form of worship exactly as Chaitanya Mahaprabhu had taught.
And Srila Prabhupada introduced a very simple step where one will stand and with one leg
swung over the other leg and alternating.
And this came to be known among the devotees those days called the Swami Step.
Those days in the early 1966-67, early days of ISKCON, Srila Prabhupada was not known as
Srila Prabhupada. The Western, those young Western American followers, they would call
And that's how when Srila Prabhupada introduced this simple form of dance,
they began to call it the Swami Step.
And so Prabhupada would have kirtans here in the storefront, in the store, 26 2nd Avenue,
the first ISKCON temple in New York. And very often Prabhupada would say that he has
come to this country, America, to this place in New York and he was teaching this
because it was the order of his spiritual master who had told him to go around the world
and spread this knowledge, awareness of Krishna and Krishna consciousness.
So Prabhupada had come at that age to a foreign land like America,
to share this knowledge about Krishna and as taught by Chaitanya Mahaprabhu.
And so at some point he introduced the form of worship that Chaitanya had introduced,
a very celebratory form of worship, singing and even dancing.
And those young American followers, not all of them were very committed, but some of them
were very committed, very devoted and they had started singing and dancing.
And Srila Prabhupada had introduced a certain routine those days.
On Mondays, Wednesdays and Fridays he would have a gathering in the evening at 7 o'clock.
Some of his very close, who were more devoted and dedicated, they would come by 6 o'clock
and there was a two bedroom apartment behind that temple, just behind where Prabhupada was living.
And they would all assemble there at 6 o'clock and Prabhupada would do an offering.
He would do an aarati, he would offer an incense for a picture of Krishna.
So they were all watching and understanding and how Swamiji is doing all of that.
And then at 7 o'clock Prabhupada would come down from his apartment to this storefront.
And by then, maybe 20, 30, 50 young Americans, boys and girls, they would have assembled.
And Srila Prabhupada would sing bhajan.
And some of his older followers would sing bhajan.
And some of his older followers would sing bhajan.
And some of his younger devotees, they would stand up and do this kirtan, swami step, simple dancing, and all of that.
And some of his older followers, they would stand up and do this kirtan, swami step, simple dancing, and all of that.
And if you are familiar, in the 1960's in America, there was a certain kind of a counter culture,
counter culture movement that was going on,
where young Americans were somehow disillusioned with the American culture,
American dream life working hard earning money having car having house and having family and all of
those kind of things and they were not very happy with the what was happening to their fathers and
mothers and they would the family would break up and then father and the mother would remarry and then
something else so there was no close tight family and this kind of a materialistic civilization there
were a lot of young Americans who were not happy with that and they were they were exploring new
methods of life new meaning of life new philosophies of life especially coming from Eastern part of the
world like Asia India Buddhism and including Hinduism all of these kind of ideas were being
experimented and these young Americans were open to try out understand all these things it was at
that time by the arrangement of Krishna Srila Prabhupada was there trying to teach Krishna
consciousness the Bhagavad Gita Chaitanya Mahaprabhu's philosophy so this would happen three
times a week and Srila Prabhupada would meet these young followers they would have some questions and
would have long discussions with them explaining philosophy and answering their questions little by
little and trying to get them to become interested in in Krishna consciousness so while all of this was
going on at some point Srila Prabhupada said that and Prabhupada would take his walk different places
and so he had also seen a park not very far from this
temple and it was known as the Tompkins Square Park and Srila Prabhupada at that time Swamiji told the
devotees to go and look and get a permission to conduct keep them in the park and they got permission

Hare Krishna Hare Krishna Krishna Krishna Hare Hare
रामा, रामा, रामा, रामा, रामा, हरे, हरे, हरे, has replaced LSD and other drugs for many of Swami's followers,
so some of them, you know, are experimenting all of these drugs and then Prabhupada would not
allow them to do that. Mr. Ginsberg said, he explained that Hare Krishna pronounced Hare
is the name for Vishnu, a Hindu God, as the bringer of light.
Rama, pronounced Rama, is the incarnation of Vishnu as the prince of responsibility.
Something, whatever that Allen Ginsberg had mentioned, that the news reporter had captured.
The chant, therefore, names different aspects of God, Mr. Ginsberg said.
Another celebrant, 26-year-old Howard Wheeler, who described himself as a former English instructor at Ohio State University,
now devoting his full time to the Swami, said,
I myself took 50 doses of LSD and a dozen of peyote in two years, and now nothing.
The Swami orders his followers to give up all intoxication.
All intoxicants, including coffee, tea, and cigarettes, he said in an interview after the ceremony.
In this sense, we are helping you. This is Swami's telling, Prabhupada's saying this.
The Swami orders his followers to give up all intoxicants, including coffee, tea, and cigarettes,
Swami said in an interview after the ceremony.
They're calling this the ceremony, that two hours of kirtan and all of that happening in the park.
The news reporter is calling it a ceremony.
In this sense, we are helping your government, Swami added.
However, because at that time, the American government, it was a big problem,
that so many young Americans are taking to LSD and drugs and all those things.
They are leaving their homes, leaving their universities, studies, and what's going to happen to them.
It was a big problem in American society.
And so, the government was very concerned about it.
Prabhupada is saying that we are helping your government.
He said, in this sense, we are helping your government, he added.
However, he indicated, the government apparently has not appreciated this help sufficiently.
For the Department of Immigration, recently told Swami Bhaktivedanta,
that his one-year visitor's visa had expired and that he must leave, he said.
Prabhupada's visa was rejected after some number of renewals.
The Swami, a swarthy man with short-cropped grayish hair
and clad in a salmon-colored robe, wore a pink sweater,
said that when he first met his own teacher or guru in 1922,
he was told to spread the cult of Krishna to the western countries,
Therefore, in this old age, 71, I have taken so much risk.
So, this is what the New York Times carried this article.
And Srila Prabhupada considered this article,
and soon after that, there were many other smaller newspapers carrying the article
Prabhupada considered this New York Times article something very significant,
this marked the beginning of the Hare Krishna movement in the western world.
So, it was a very significant appearance.
So, after that, devotees would do the Swami step,
and arms raised up as Chaitanya Mahaprabhu used to do.
And so, this became the practice.
All over, and many more temples were opened up.
